releasedThisWeek.title: 超级少女
releasedThisWeek.summary: 当一位冷酷无情、突如其来的劲敌突袭家园，“超级少女”卡拉·佐-艾尔不得不与一位意想不到的同伴结盟，横跨星际，踏上一段交织复仇与正义的壮阔征途。

releasedThisWeek.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
releasedThisWeek.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to t

releasedThisWeek.title: 熊乡
releasedThisWeek.summary: 克罗将饰演年迈却令人生畏的俱乐部老板曼科・卡帕克，他遭到一名蒙面持枪歹徒抢劫。如今，他原本打算卖掉俱乐部，与女友一同安享晚年的愿望，似乎变得比以往更加遥不可及。贩毒集团的头目们对他步步紧逼，而一个初出茅庐的年轻人在镇上崭露头角，急切地想要买下这家俱乐部。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious ne

upcoming.title: 痴迷
upcoming.summary: 在折断神秘的“心愿柳”以赢得暗恋对象的心之后，一个对爱情充满幻想的人如愿以偿地得到了自己想要的一切，但很快他发现，有些欲望需要付出黑暗而可怕的代价。
upcoming.summaryEn: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinis

upcoming.title: 玩具总动员5
upcoming.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
upcoming.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new

upcoming.title: 后室
upcoming.summary: 一位心理治疗师的病人，在一次诡异的事故中“切入”到了一个超越现实的奇异维度。为了带回病人，这位治疗师不得不亲自踏入那片无边无际、充满黄色壁纸和嗡嗡荧光灯响声的未知迷宫。
upcoming.summaryEn: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

upcoming.title: 深水
upcoming.summary: 一架从洛杉矶飞往上海的国际航班，在飞越太平洋时遭遇货舱锂电池起火事故，安全系统接连失效，机长理查德与副机长本被迫驾驶飞机紧急迫降在海域。机上三十余名幸存者被困在破损的飞机残骸上，很快发现这片海域已是鲨鱼的猎场。成群的灰鲭鲨被残骸的血腥味吸引，不断发起攻击。幸存者们来自不同国家、背景各异，必须放下隔阂与猜忌，利用有限的资源搭建防御、寻找逃生机会，在茫茫大海中与饥饿的鲨群展开殊死对抗。
upcoming.summaryEn: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcom

upcoming.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
upcoming.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！
upcoming.summaryEn: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to t

upcoming.title: 安昂传奇：最后的气宗
upcoming.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。
upcoming.summaryEn: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls i

upcoming.title: 火遮眼
upcoming.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
upcoming.summaryEn: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wi

upcoming.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
upcoming.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
upcoming.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

upcoming.title: 幽旅巫咒
upcoming.summary: 小说家欧姆·鲍曼前往一家偏远客栈，为父母撒落骨灰，却被一则传闻缠上——蜜月套房里，有女巫在此徘徊作祟。诡异的幻象接连浮现，一桩骇人失踪案骤然发生，迫使他必须面对自己过往中那些阴暗不堪的角落。
upcoming.summaryEn: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces

upcoming.title: 奥德赛
upcoming.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
upcoming.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,

upcoming.title: 调音师
upcoming.summary: 一位才华横溢的钢琴调音师，发现自己精湛的钢琴调音技艺可以用于破解保险箱，由此他的生活发生了翻天覆地的变化。
upcoming.summaryEn: A gifted piano tuner's meticulous skills for tuning pianos lead him to discover an unexpected aptitude for cracking safes, turning his life upside down.

upcoming.title: 驾驶课
upcoming.summary: 《河谷的艾德》讲述了一群青少年偷走学校里的驾驶培训用车，进行一次公路旅行的故事。他们的目的是帮助一位高中毕业生找到他大学一年级时的女友，并让她重新回到他的身边。
upcoming.summaryEn: A group of teens hit the road in a stolen driver's ed car, racing against time to help a lovesick high school senior track down his college-freshman girlfriend and win her back.

upcoming.title: 征服者2
upcoming.summary: 当敌对帮派、腐败官员和冷酷的伊克巴尔少校步步紧逼，哈姆扎为国家而战的使命逐渐沦陷为一场血腥的个人复仇。在利亚里的街头，爱国者与恶魔的界限逐渐模糊。
upcoming.summaryEn: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the s

upcoming.title: 海洋奇缘：启航
upcoming.summary: 海的召唤，从未停止。熟悉的旋律响起，属于“莫阿娜”的冒险，再次扬帆启航。
upcoming.summaryEn: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

upcoming.title: 群体
upcoming.summary: 因不明感染事件被封锁在一栋大楼内的幸存者们，与以不可预测形态进化的感染者展开殊死搏斗。
upcoming.summaryEn: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility. Trapped inside with no escape, Se-j

upcoming.title: 怒兽出笼
upcoming.summary: 前MMA传奇巴顿·詹姆斯早已告别八角笼，以渔夫身份过着拮据的生活，与妻子卢西亚娜、女儿麦迪相依为命。他的弟弟马龙在MMA赛场遭现任冠军泽维尔·格劳恶意重创，重伤入院，还欠下高利贷巨额债务。为救弟弟、守护即将迎来新生命的家庭，巴顿找到曾被他辜负的昔日教练萨米，重新踏上训练之路，准备重返 ONE 冠军赛的八角笼，与残暴的格劳展开对决。
upcoming.summaryEn: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship a

upcoming.title: 罗宾汉之死
upcoming.summary: 罗宾汉一生沉沦于罪恶和杀戮，饱受过往阴影的折磨。一场他以为是绝唱的战斗后，他身负重伤。一位神秘女子给了他救赎的希望。
upcoming.summaryEn: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chan

upcoming.title: 深海魅影
upcoming.summary: 在挪威壮丽的深峡湾畔，宁静的小渔村维加斯发生了一系列令人匪夷所思的事件。海洋生物学家约翰娜正在当地的鱼场进行一项常规科研项目，起初完全沉浸在这片世外桃源的自然美景中。然而，这份宁静被骤然打破：两名当地青少年相继离奇死亡，整个村庄陷入前所未有的恐慌与猜疑之中。随着调查的深入，约翰娜发现所有迹象都指向峡湾那深不见底的黑暗水域。她凭借专业知识和设备进行探测，最终揭示了令人窒息的真相！
upcoming.summaryEn: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more

upcoming.title: 大卫
upcoming.summary: 在一个被恐惧统治的王国里，一位年轻的牧羊人勇敢地面对巨人以及其背后的黑暗势力。他的勇气将唤醒一个民族，并证明真正的力量来自信任，而非权力。
upcoming.summaryEn: From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a s

upcoming.title: 鬼玩人6：燃烧
upcoming.summaryEn: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life - survive even in death.

nowPlaying.title: 揭秘日
nowPlaying.summary: 如果有人告诉你，我们并非宇宙中唯一的智慧生命，并且向你展示、证明了这一点，你会感到恐惧吗？今年夏天，真相将属于七十亿人。我们正一步步接近……揭秘日。

nowPlaying.title: 惊声尖笑6
nowPlaying.summary: 在逃离那个似曾相识的面具杀手二十六年后，核心四人组再度成为猎杀目标，而这一次，所有恐怖电影IP都将无一幸免。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

nowPlaying.title: 公民义警
nowPlaying.summary: 男主角桑德斯是一名义警，他追捕罪犯、伸张正义，成为社交媒体红人和公众眼中的英雄，但当地警察局长认为他是社会的威胁，打算将他打倒。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

nowPlaying.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

nowPlaying.title: 宝莱坞鸡尾酒2
nowPlaying.summary: 在一起十年后，当老朋友艾丽重新走进迪娅和库纳尔的生活时，他们的感情受到了冲击。起初只是两个女人之间的一个计划，却逐渐演变成一片混乱，引发了一系列令人捧腹又充满情感波折的状况，这一切他们谁都始料未及。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: After a decade together, Diya and Kunal's relationship is shaken when Ally, an old friend, re-enters their lives. What begins as a plan between two women spirals into chaos, triggering hilarious, emot

nowPlaying.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
nowPlaying.summary: 亚当（尼古拉斯·加利齐纳 饰）在神秘圣剑的召唤下，尘封十五年的异世界王子身份觉醒，平凡人生被彻底颠覆。他跨越时空重返埃坦尼亚，但故乡早已在骷髅王的统治下分崩离析。为拯救曾经的家园与现在的世界，亚当必须再次拔出圣剑，喊出那句响彻寰宇的咒语——“赐予我力量吧！我是希曼！”

nowPlaying.title: 诱鲨
nowPlaying.summary: 一场在地中海沿岸举行的目的地婚礼以灾难告终，宾客们发现自己要与一条嗜人鲨和一个神秘而阴险的渔夫搏斗。

nowPlaying.title: 佩迪

nowPlaying.summaryEn: In 1980s rural Andhra Pradesh, a spirited villager unites his community through sports to defend their pride against a powerful rivals.

nowPlaying.title: 源信号
nowPlaying.summary: 讲述了一名计算机科学家，被一位科技富豪招募，参与一个足以改变人类在宇宙中地位的项目的故事。

nowPlaying.title: 掌上明珠
nowPlaying.summary: 在恐惧与勇敢交织的时刻，一位女性发现，拥抱自身的脆弱，与直面挑战一样，对内在力量至关重要。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.

nowPlaying.title: 罗宾汉之死
nowPlaying.summary: 罗宾汉一生沉沦于罪恶和杀戮，饱受过往阴影的折磨。一场他以为是绝唱的战斗后，他身负重伤。一位神秘女子给了他救赎的希望。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chan

nowPlaying.title: 诺曼底72小时
nowPlaying.summary: 聚焦诺曼底登陆前夕的紧张局势，围绕盟军远征军最高司令部首席气象学家詹姆斯·斯塔格上尉展开，他的职责是向盟军最高指挥官德怀特·戴维·艾森豪威尔通报决定成败的天气状况。
